Prismatic - F#/.NET AI Development Workspace
=============================================

QUICK START:

  1. prismatic init [count]          # Create workspace (optional: 1-10 agents, default: 5)

  2. ⚠️ IMPORTANT: Configure your workspace
     Edit these files in .prismatic/ folder:

     📝 .prismatic/agent-names.json  # Customize agent names (Skinner, Scully, Mulder, Busch)
     📝 .prismatic/tokens.env        # Add Slack/Teams/GChat tokens (optional)

  3. prismatic start slack           # Start conductor (optional)
  4. prismatic green                 # Launch an agent

INSTALLATION:

Install Prismatic as a .NET tool:

  # Install globally
  dotnet tool install -g Prismatic

  # Update to latest
  dotnet tool update -g Prismatic

USAGE:

  prismatic init [count]             Initialize workspace (optional: 1-10 agents, default: 5)
  prismatic compile                  Compile F# tools for all agents (48x faster!)
  prismatic <color>                  Launch agent workspace
  prismatic start [conductor]        Start conductor daemon (slack/teams/gchat)
  prismatic stop [conductor]         Stop conductor daemon
  prismatic status [conductor]       Check conductor status
  prismatic restart [conductor]      Restart conductor daemon

COMMANDS:

  help                               Show this help message
  init [count]                       Initialize Prismatic workspace (1-10 agents)
  compile                            Compile all F# tools (2.4s → 50ms startup)
  start [slack|teams|gchat]          Start conductor daemon (default: slack)
  stop [slack|teams|gchat]           Stop conductor daemon (default: slack)
  status [slack|teams|gchat]         Check conductor status (default: slack)
  restart [slack|teams|gchat]        Restart conductor daemon (default: slack)

AGENTS:

  green   → Agent-Green in ./green
  red     → Agent-Red in ./red
  blue    → Agent-Blue in ./blue
  black   → Agent-Black in ./black
  and so on also: yellow, purple, pink, orange, brown, white

OPTIONS:

  --help, -h    Show this help message
  --version     Show version information

EXAMPLES:

  prismatic init           # Initialize workspace with 5 agents (default: green, red, blue, black, yellow)
  prismatic init 10        # Initialize workspace with all 10 agents
  prismatic init 4         # Initialize workspace with 4 agents (green, red, blue, black)
  prismatic start slack    # Start SlackConductor daemon for Slack integration
  prismatic start teams    # Start TeamsConductor daemon for Microsoft Teams
  prismatic start gchat    # Start GChatConductor daemon for Google Chat
  prismatic green          # Start green agent (Product Owner)
  prismatic red            # Start red agent (TDD Senior Developer)
  prismatic status teams   # Check if TeamsConductor daemon is running
  prismatic stop gchat     # Stop GChatConductor daemon

OPTIONAL INTEGRATIONS:

Prismatic works standalone. These are completely optional:

  SlackConductor        - Slack integration (prismatic start slack)
  TeamsConductor        - Microsoft Teams integration (prismatic start teams)
  GChatConductor        - Google Chat integration (prismatic start gchat)
  SharedFolderConductor - Folder-based fallback (prismatic start sharedfolder) [⚠️  last resort]
  LinearFlow      - Linear ticket management (requires LINEAR_API_KEY)
  MergeInsight    - GitHub PR analysis (requires gh CLI)

CONFIGURATION (.prismatic/tokens.env):

  EDITOR=OPENCODE   Launch with OpenCode CLI (default)
  EDITOR=VSCODE     Launch with Visual Studio Code + AI extension
  NO_EMOJI=1        Disable emoji output (use ASCII fallbacks)
  NO_COLOR=1        Disable colored output (standard convention)

For more information, see README.md
